name: codemap-boost-codex
description: CodeMap workflow for Codex using code-review-graph MCP guidance, background graph updates, and AGENTS.md instructions.

interface.shortDescription: Nudge Codex toward code-review-graph for code structure work.
interface.longDescription: Maintains Codex-native CodeMap guidance in AGENTS.md when code-review-graph is available, protects generated graph output from commits, automatically builds or updates graphs from hooks, and nudges prompts, shell searches, and subagents toward graph-aware code exploration.
defaultPrompt: Set up CodeMap Boost for this Codex environment.
